top.contains: A bright blue header containing the Amazon Prime logo (prime text with the arrow below) and descriptive text on red and yellow panels in the upper-center and upper-right.

bottom.contains: A solid blue frame edge/border with no other content.

left.contains: A blue frame edge featuring a vertical red banner that states "4% OF WIDTH OF AD GIVES BORDER SIZE".

right.contains: A solid blue frame edge/border with no other content.

frameAnalysis.corners: Amazon Prime logo with branding and a yellow informational container are in the top section.
frameAnalysis.instructions: Place the main hero and title within the center or right-center of the artwork to avoid any overlap with the large Prime branding in the top area and the red text banner along the entire left side. Focus key elements within the middle 50% horizontally, and between the 40% and 90% vertical range.

frameInstructions: Place the main hero and title within the center or right-center of the artwork to avoid any overlap with the large Prime branding in the top area and the red text banner along the entire left side. Focus key elements within the middle 50% horizontally, and between the 40% and 90% vertical range.
